Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."callID", T0."createDate", T0."subject", T0."itemCode", T0."manufSN", T0."custmrName", T1."Name" AS "CallStatus" FROM OSCL T0 INNER JOIN OSCS T1 ON T0."status" = T1."statusID" WHERE T0."insID" = {?ServiceCallSubDocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."ContractID", T1."StartDate", T1."EndDate", T0."SrvcType" FROM OCTR T0 INNER JOIN CTR1 T1 ON T1."ContractID" = T0."ContractID" WHERE T0."CntrcType" = 'S' AND T0."CstmrCode" = (SELECT "customer" FROM OINS WHERE "insID" = {?ServiceContractSubDocKey@}) AND ((T1."StartDate" <= TO_DATE(NOW()) AND T1."EndDate" >= TO_DATE(NOW()) AND (T1."TermDate" >= TO_DATE(NOW()) OR T1."TermDate" IS NULL)) OR T1."StartDate" > TO_DATE(NOW()) OR (T1."EndDate" < TO_DATE(NOW()) OR (T1."TermDate" < TO_DATE(NOW()) AND T1."TermDate" IS NOT NULL))) AND T1."ItemCode" = (SELECT "itemCode" FROM OINS WHERE "insID" = {?ServiceContractSubDocKey@}) AND T1."InternalSN" = (SELECT "internalSN" FROM OINS WHERE "insID" = {?ServiceContractSubDocKey@})

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."custmrName", T3."Name" AS "ContactPerson", T0."manufSN", T0."internalSN", T0."itemCode", T0."itemName", T0."status", T0."deliveryNo", T0."dlvryDate", T1."Phone1", T2."lastName" AS "TechnicianLastName", T2."firstName" AS "TechnicianFirstName" FROM OINS T0 LEFT OUTER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0."customer" = T1."CardCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OHEM T2 ON T0."technician" = T2."empID" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR T3 ON T0."contactCod" = T3."CntctCode" WHERE T0."insID" = {?DOCKEY@}

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Stamdata for kundeequipment', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Stammdaten Kundenequipment', True, 'Customer Equipment Card'//Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'På værksted', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'In Werkstatt', True, 'In Repair Lab'//Default English )
